site.name: Inspection Academy test
site.tagline: Your Trusted Partner for Training Solutions & Consulting Services
site.description: Elevating industry standards through rigorous certification and expert consultation in oil, gas, and energy sectors.

courses.title: API 510 Pressure Vessel Inspector
courses.description: Comprehensive certification preparation for pressure vessel inspection, repair, alteration, and rerating.
courses.fullDescription: Advanced technical training designed to prepare experienced professionals for the API 510 certification exam, ensuring structural integrity and safety compliance.
courses.objectives: Master the calculations for corrosion rates, remaining life, and inspection intervals. Understand welding procedures, non-destructive examination (NDE) methods, and the evaluation of flaws in pressure vessels operating under the API 510 code.
materials: ASME Section VIII, Div 1 & ASME Section IX

courses.title: API 570 Piping Inspector
courses.description: In-depth training for the inspection, repair, alteration, and rerating of in-service piping systems.
courses.fullDescription: Covers all aspects of piping inspection including corrosion monitoring, damage mechanisms, and repair methods per API 570 standard.
courses.objectives: Understand piping system damage mechanisms, corrosion monitoring, and inspection methodologies required for API 570 certification.

courses.title: Phased Array Ultrasonic Testing
courses.description: Hands-on PAUT training covering sector scans, linear scans, and advanced flaw characterization.
courses.fullDescription: Master the latest phased array ultrasonic testing techniques used in weld inspection, corrosion mapping, and composite testing.
courses.objectives: Learn to operate PAUT equipment, configure scans, and interpret results for welds and complex geometries.

consultationServices.title: Risk-Based Inspection (RBI)
consultationServices.description: Optimize inspection intervals and resources by prioritizing critical equipment based on risk assessment methodologies.

consultationServices.title: Fitness-for-Service (FFS)
consultationServices.description: Quantitative engineering evaluations to demonstrate the structural integrity of in-service components containing flaws.

consultationServices.title: Equipment Audit
consultationServices.description: Comprehensive audit of plant equipment to identify deterioration, code compliance gaps, and maintenance needs.

consultationServices.title: Compliance Check
consultationServices.description: Regulatory compliance assessment against international standards like API, ASME, and OSHA requirements.

consultationServices.title: Structural Integrity
consultationServices.description: Assessment and life extension programs for aging structures in refining, petrochemical, and power generation.

consultationServices.title: Risk Assessment
consultationServices.description: Systematic process to evaluate hazards, quantify risks, and develop mitigation strategies for industrial facilities.

about.headline: Precision in Every Inspection.
about.body: We are the leading authority in industrial inspection certification, setting the global standard for safety, precision, and technical excellence in the energy sector.
about.mission: To equip industrial professionals with uncompromising technical expertise, ensuring the structural integrity and safety of global energy infrastructure through rigorous training.
about.vision: To be the world's most trusted provider of inspection and integrity management training, recognized for measurable impact on industry safety records.
